positions.name: iShares Core S&P 500 UCITS ETF (Acc)
positions.thesis: Core broad market exposure to S&P 500. IE-domiciled accumulating structure eliminates 30% WHT on distributions — structurally optimal vehicle for a Lebanese resident. Held as the portfolio anchor targeting 36% of NAV. Currently severely underweight at 25.79% of total portfolio NAV (1.4745 shares, avg cost $706.41). The $250 ADD trade has been recommended for SIX consecutive weekly reports (April 11, 13, 15, 16, 17) and remains unexecuted — a critical operational failure costing measurable returns while the S&P 500 has reached new all-time highs (7,041.28 on April 16, first close above 7,000 in history). Tranche 3 ($242.41 post-CSPX-buy) has a hard deployment deadline of May 3, 2026 (16 days from April 17). The unexecuted CSPX buy is the single most urgent action in the portfolio.
invalidation_conditions: Structural shift away from US equities as the dominant long-term growth engine
A superior WHT-efficient broad market vehicle becomes available

positions.name: Amazon.com Inc
positions.thesis: Conviction dip buy entered during Liberation Day tariff shock. Core thesis: AWS cloud dominance (~33% global cloud market share), advertising revenue at double-digit growth, and AI infrastructure investment (Bedrock, Trainium custom silicon). AI revenue run rate now $15B; $200B 2026 capex commitment demonstrates deep management conviction. CEO Jassy's shareholder letter widely praised by analysts. Tariff cost pressures on the retail segment flagged in April 2026 but are not thesis-invalidating given AWS and advertising dominance. No dividend means 0% WHT. As of April 16: up +16.71% from entry ($249.70 vs cost $213.94). Analyst consensus: 95% Buy/Strong Buy, $281 average price target (13% upside from current). Thesis conviction: HIGH and STRENGTHENING.
invalidation_conditions: AWS loses meaningful cloud market share to Azure or GCP on a sustained basis
Regulatory breakup that separates AWS from the retail/advertising business
Sustained margin compression across all segments (retail, advertising, AND cloud simultaneously)

positions.name: SPDR Gold Shares
positions.thesis: Macro hedge against dollar weakness, geopolitical risk, and inflationary pressure. Gold has no cash flows so carries zero WHT exposure despite US domicile. XAU/USD at approximately $4,830/oz as of April 2026, with GLD at $440.08. Prior reports noted gold declining from the January 29 ATH — however the Iran war (Strait of Hormuz still disrupted, fragile ceasefire, US naval blockade active April 13) is actively supporting safe-haven demand. Central bank ETF inflows at 920 tonnes (up from 840t end-2025). Major institutional gold forecasts are uniformly bullish: J.P. Morgan targets XAU $5,055/oz by Q4 2026 (implies GLD ~$468); RBC targets $4,800 by year-end; Wells Fargo projects $6,100-6,300. THESIS REVISED STRONGER: prior report assessment of eroding safe-haven demand understated the Iran war tail risk. GLD at $440.08 is well above the $420 price alert threshold. Hold. Price alert remains at GLD $420 — breach triggers 25% trim and CSPX redeployment.
invalidation_conditions: Sustained USD strengthening cycle driven by structurally higher real rates that persist above inflation
Major reversal in central bank gold buying trend (multiple major central banks becoming net sellers)
GLD breaks and holds below $420 — triggers 25% trim rebalance into CSPX
Iran war fully and durably resolved AND Strait of Hormuz fully reopened AND risk-on environment maintained for 4+ consecutive weeks

positions.name: Mastercard Inc
positions.wht_exposure: 30% WHT on dividend — confirmed $0.22 withheld on $0.73 April dividend. Annualised WHT drag <$1 at current position size. Immaterial.
positions.thesis: Conviction dip buy during Liberation Day volatility. Thesis: payments network duopoly (MA + Visa) with near-monopoly economics, asset-light model generating high ROE, global consumer spending volume exposure, and pricing power. As of April 16: up +1.03% unrealized ($518.54 vs cost $513.24). Analyst consensus: Strong Buy, $655 average price target (30%+ upside from current price). CRITICAL CHECKPOINT: Q1 2026 earnings due April 30, 2026. Some analysts flagging deceleration in US and cross-border payment volumes and rising regulatory scrutiny. The April 30 earnings print is a binary validation event — beat on volumes and confident guidance = thesis reinforced and Tranche 3 add becomes priority; miss or guidance cut = evaluate partial exit and redeploy into CSPX. Designated Tranche 3 co-target: ADD $100 if S&P drops 5-7% from ~7,041 or post-earnings beat confirms thesis. Dividend yield <1% means WHT drag is under $1/year at current size.
invalidation_conditions: Disintermediation by real-time payment rails (FedNow, open banking) gaining scale at the expense of card networks
Regulatory caps on interchange fees in core US or European markets
Q1 2026 earnings (April 30) miss on volumes or management guides down — re-evaluate immediately
Sustained global consumer spending contraction lasting multiple quarters

positions.name: NVIDIA Corporation
positions.thesis: AI infrastructure buildout driving unprecedented GPU demand. NVDA holds dominant position in AI training and inference hardware; CUDA ecosystem creates deep switching costs. As of April 17: up +9.0% from entry ($198.35 vs cost $181.98). MAJOR NEW CATALYST (April 2026): At GTC 2026, Jensen Huang revealed $1 trillion in confirmed purchase orders through 2027 — not projections, not estimates, but actual purchase orders. This is an extraordinary fundamental data point that materially de-risks the demand thesis. Vera Rubin platform debut and Feynman 2028 architecture roadmap confirm a multi-year innovation pipeline. Stock up +18% over 10 consecutive trading sessions — longest streak in years. Hyperscaler AI capex supercycle fully confirmed: Meta $60B, Amazon $200B 2026 commitments. China H20 restrictions are a known, priced-in risk — the $5.5B inventory charge was taken previously and no new expansion in April 2026. Next earnings: May 20, 2026. Thesis conviction: STRONGLY HIGH. Do not add at elevated post-surge levels — let position compound and reassess on pullback to $180-185 range.
invalidation_conditions: AMD or custom silicon (Google TPU, Amazon Trainium, Microsoft Maia) takes meaningful and sustained share in AI training workloads
AI capex cycle reverses — hyperscalers visibly cut or guide down infrastructure spend across multiple quarters
Export restrictions to China expand materially beyond current guidance, reducing total addressable market by >15%
Post-GTC 2026: $1T order backlog proves overstated or a significant portion of orders cancelled in subsequent quarters

positions.name: ASML Holding NV
positions.wht_exposure: 15% Dutch WHT assumed (treaty rate). ACTION REQUIRED: verify on next IBKR tax document whether 15% (NL treaty) or 30% (US NRA flat) is actually being applied. If 30%, evaluate switching to AMS-listed ASML shares to eliminate US NRA withholding entirely.
positions.thesis: Monopoly supplier of EUV lithography systems — no credible competitor exists for leading-edge chip manufacturing. Every advanced fab (TSMC, Samsung, Intel) is ASML-dependent for sub-7nm production. Q1 2026 earnings (April 15, 2026): BEAT — EUR 8.8B revenue (vs EUR 8.5B consensus), EUR 2.8B net income (vs EUR 2.5B expected). Full-year 2026 guidance RAISED to EUR 36-40B (from EUR 34-39B). Q2 2026 guidance: EUR 8.4-9.0B revenue. Fundamental thesis intact. HEADWIND MATERIALIZING: China sales fell from 36% to 19% of net sales Q4 2025 → Q1 2026 — export control restrictions are visibly compressing the China revenue mix. However, guidance was raised (not cut) in Q1, indicating the non-China business is more than compensating. Stock at $1,410.83 (April 16), above cost basis $1,397.14. Net conviction: HOLD — EUV monopoly and raised guidance outweigh China restriction headwind at current position size. Monitor Q2 2026 commentary closely: if management guides China sales below 15% or overall revenue guidance is cut, reevaluate.
invalidation_conditions: China develops a credible domestic EUV alternative — assessed as a 5-10 year horizon risk, not near-term
Semiconductor capex supercycle ends and fab customers cancel or significantly delay EUV orders at scale
Dutch or US government export restrictions expand materially beyond current ASML guidance, causing revenue guidance to be CUT (not merely compressed China mix)
Post-Q1 2026: management signals materially weaker forward demand or China mix falls below 15% of net sales with no offsetting guidance raise

positions.name: iShares USD Treasury Bond 0-3 Month UCITS ETF (Acc)
positions.thesis: Cash equivalent / capital preservation layer with 0% effective WHT. Replaced SGOV (which carried 30% WHT on distributions) — structurally optimal for Lebanese residents. US Treasury interest paid to an Irish-domiciled fund qualifies for the portfolio interest exemption from NRA withholding. Near-zero duration risk (0-3M). YIELD UPDATE: Weighted average YTM has compressed to 3.68% as of April 13, 2026 — down from the ~4.3% thesis baseline, a 62bps decline reflecting shift in rate expectations. At ~13.89% of total portfolio NAV (14.6% of equity+FI). The opportunity cost vs equities is rising sharply as S&P 500 reaches all-time highs and the Fed is expected to deliver two rate cuts in 2026. FORMALLY INITIATING STAGE-DOWN PLAN: Target reduction from ~14-15% → ~10% of NAV, executed in stages as: (1) CSPX $250 ADD executes and gap narrows; (2) Tranche 3 deploys (May 3 deadline); (3) April 28-29 FOMC provides guidance on rate cut timeline. Do not trim U03A before CSPX gap is meaningfully closed. Thesis conviction: HOLD for now, with a clear exit plan forming.
invalidation_conditions: Fed cuts rates aggressively (>100bps in 2026) — opportunity cost vs equities rises significantly, accelerate trim
A better WHT-efficient fixed income vehicle with superior risk-adjusted return is identified
Portfolio NAV grows large enough (>$10K) that maintaining a 15% cash equivalent layer imposes unacceptable drag on long-term returns
YTM falls below 3.0% — at that point, reduce toward 8-10% of NAV immediately
